name: Blueberry and White Chocolate Cheese Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Line the bottom of a 9-inch tart pan with parchment paper.
2. Mix the crust ingredients and press into the pan, slightly up the sides.
3. Chill.
4. Melt white chocolate in a double boiler over hot but not boiling water, stirring constantly.
5. In a separate bowl, whip cream cheese for 3 minutes.
6. Add the melted white chocolate; beat until smooth.
7. Add sour cream and beat again until very smooth.
8. Pipe filling into concentric circles on top of the crust using a star tip and pastry bag.
9. Fill the entire crust with the mixture and chill until firm.
10. For the topping, rinse fresh blueberries and toss with 1/4 cup sugar.
11. Heap the blueberries onto the filling.
12. Garnish with lemon zest and white chocolate shavings.
